examples: Michael: I took a girl to crematory , she was a ghost.
The cab stops in front of the crematory. And we can see the gate is shut.
From cycle economy perspective, garbage is a kind of resource which is disposed to crematory by mistake.
That's why I was intrigued when Paws, Whiskers and Wags, the Georgia pet crematory that handled Daisy's remains, introduced monthly group grief counseling sessions.
After he bought the crematory, Remkus asked his own vet to send referrals his way, but the vet was already working with another crematory company.
